title: selaginella kanehirae
intro: Selaginella kanehirae, also known as Kanehirae spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its distinctive spore-bearing structures and ability to thrive in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Selaginella kanehirae include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
